prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 2411→3047→3746→3428→5103，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其 2025 年较 2024 年后移约 1675 名，基准位次约 5103 名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划 2021 年 41 人、2022 年 44 人、2023 年 44 人、2024 年 48 人、2025 年 53 人，2026 年计划 46 人，较 2025 年缩招 7 人（约 13.2%），缩招使竞争略有缓解，位次数字有减小压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华东师范大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年排名第 29 位（近年稳定在 28–31 名），属于全国顶尖师范类高校，办学层次高，对考生持续具有较强吸引力；2026 年声誉评价未出现明显负面信号，整体平稳；抖音热度排名第 28 位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；未见投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；教育学 A+、统计学 A+、体育学 A+、心理学 A、软件工程 A、数学 A、中国语言文学 A、地理学 A、生态学 A 等 14 个学科获评 A- 及以上，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有显著吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，华东师大在软件工程（A）、统计学 （A+）、数学（A）等方向优势突出；辽宁省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20 万，按近年物理类占比约 70% 估算约 14 万人，较 2025 年（14.3 万）基本持平；华东师范大学位于上海，地域吸引力强；该校在辽宁省招生占比约 2.3%–3.2%，属跨省招生正常比例，无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5103、2026 年缩招约 13.2%及学校高层次的持续吸引力，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年有所前移（位次数字减小），但缩招效应被学校品牌和热门专业热度部分抵消；预测最低位次约 4729 名，区间 4229–5229 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 统计学（双学位）（与计算机科学与技术进行双学士学位培养）
- 数学与应用数学
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 微电子科学与工程
- 统计学类（统计学、数据科学）
- 通信工程
- 物理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息科学与技术
- 心理学（双学位）（与计算机科学与技术进行双学士学位培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 4229–5229 名内，建议以二档专业（计算机、统计学类、通信工程等）为主攻方向，一档专业（统计学双学位、数学、数据科学等）作为冲刺，三档专业稳妥保底。华东师大在软件工程、统 计学、数学等学科实力突出，结合当前计算机/电子信息类高热趋势，二档专业性价比最高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 2411→3047→3746→3428→5103, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, especially in 2025, which shifted back by about 1675 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 5103; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 41 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 48 in 2024, 53 in 2025, and 46 in 2026, a reduction of 7 students (about 13.2%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and puts downward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: East China Normal University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 28–31 in recent years), belonging to the top normal universities in China, with a high educational level and sustained strong appeal to candidates; in 2026, there were no obvious negative signals in reputation evaluation, overall stable; Douyin popularity ranked 28th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms; no record of admission gaps, stable application psychology; 14 disciplines including Education A+, Statistics A+, Physical Education A+, Psychology A, Software Engineering A, Mathematics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Geography A, Ecology A, etc., were rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength, significantly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended; East China Normal University has outstanding advantages in Software Engineering (A), Statistics (A+), Mathematics (A), etc.; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Province general college entrance examination is about 200,000, estimated at about 140,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 70%, basically flat compared to 2025 (143,000); East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning Province is about 2.3%–3.2%, a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5103, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 13.2%, and the sustained high appeal of the university, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases), but the reduction effect is partially offset by the university brand and popular major heat; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4729, with a range of 4229–5229.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Statistics (Double Degree) (Dual Bachelor's Degree with Computer Science and Technology)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Statistics (Statistics, Data Science)
- Communication Engineering
- Physics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information Science and Technology
- Psychology (Double Degree) (Dual Bachelor's Degree with Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 4229–5229, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Statistics, Communication Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Statistics Double Degree, Mathematics, Data Science, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. East China Normal University has outstanding strengths in Software Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, etc., combined with the current high trend of Computer/Electronic Information majors, Tier 2 majors offer the best cost-performance ratio.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次分别为 438→503→637→767→824，呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 386 名，2025 年基准约 824 名；该校在辽宁省历史类招生计划 2021 年 18 人、2022 年 18 人、2023 年 22 人、2024 年 19 人、2025 年 17 人，2026 年计划 20 人，较 2025 年扩招 3 人（约 17.6%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字有增大压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科主榜 2026 年第 29 位，全国顶尖师范类高校，对文科考生吸引力持续强劲；2026 年声誉平稳，未见负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 28 位（较热），曝光度中等偏上；无投档断档记录；教育学 A+、中国语言文学 A、世界史 A、心理学 A、外国语言文学 A-、马克思主义理论 A- 等，文科类学科实力突出，对汉语言文学、新闻传播、金融学类等招生专业有直接支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 汉语言/中文 推荐（偏热）、法学 分化观望、师范/教育 分化观望、新闻传播 明显劝退；辽宁省 2026 年历史类考生按近年占比约 30% 估算约 6 万人，较 2025 年（5.6 万）略有增加；上海地域优势明显，华东师大在辽宁省历史类招生占比约 2%–3%，属正常跨省比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 824、2026 年扩招约 17.6%及考生总数小幅增加，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年继续后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约 926 名，区间 821–1031 名。

- 金融学类（金融学、经济学）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 438→503→637→767→824, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 386 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 824 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for History Category was 18 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 19 in 2024, 17 in 2025, and 20 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (about 17.6%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 29th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top-tier normal university nationwide, with sustained strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; stable reputation in 2026, no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 28th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure; no record of admission gaps; Education A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Psychology A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, Marxist Theory A-, etc., with outstanding strength in liberal arts disciplines, directly supporting enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, and Finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature recommended (relatively hot), Law differentiated and wait-and-see, Teacher Training/Education differentiated and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province is estimated at about 60,000 based on a recent proportion of about 30%, slightly higher than 2025 (56,000); Shanghai's regional advantage is obvious, and East China Normal University's enrollment proportion for History Category in Liaoning Province is about 2%–3%, a normal cross-province ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 824, an enrollment expansion of about 17.6% in 2026, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward (ranking number increases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 926, with a range of 821–1031.

- Finance (Finance, Economics).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 821–1031, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese International Education, Journalism and Communication), aim for Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Finance) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Chinese Language and Literature is a traditional advantage major of East China Normal University (Chinese Language and Literature A), with high application popularity, and the ranking needs to be in the upper-middle part of the range to be secure.
